text: {"acknowledges_specifics":true,"no_unverifiable_promise":true,"states_next_steps":true,"invents_no_policy":true,"consistent_with_gold":false,"within_length":true,"justification":"It references the NY license, three rejections, two-week delay, and stuck funds, avoids guarantees and invented rules, and outlines next steps (routing to KYC and checking image quality), but it misses the gold-note requirement to commit to a KYC review within X hours while remaining concise."}
